name: Outdoor Holding Co
business: Outdoor Holding Co operates GunBroker, an online marketplace for firearms, hunting, shooting and related products. It facilitates transactions between third-party buyers and sellers without holding inventory, except for branded merchandise. Revenue is concentrated among the most active buyers and sellers on the platform.
sellsTo: Outdoor enthusiasts, sport shooters, collectors, and general consumers of firearms and related products
Sellers ranging from individual users and small businesses to large-scale retailers and manufacturers
Industry partners including FFLs, manufacturers, media and publishing organizations, and service providers

exposures.sentence: GunBroker is a leading online marketplace dedicated to firearms, hunting, shooting and related products.
In March 2026, we deployed a proprietary AI-powered listing tool to improve seller productivity and listing quality.

We have integrated a variety of processes, technologies, and controls to assist in our efforts to assess, identify, and manage material cybersecurity-related risks, but these efforts are not exhaustive and may not be adequate to prevent or detect service interruption, system failure, data loss or theft, or other material adverse consequences.

catalysts.event: Integration with Master FFL platform to enhance dealer verification and streamline firearm transfer workflows
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we initiated integration with the Master FFL platform to enhance our marketplace technology and compliance infrastructure.

catalysts.event: Deployment of proprietary AI-powered listing tool
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we deployed a proprietary AI-powered listing tool to improve seller productivity and listing quality.

catalysts.event: Authorization of share repurchase program of up to $15.0 million
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, our Board of Directors approved a share repurchase program authorizing the repurchase of up to $15.0 million of shares of our common stock from time to time in either an approved 10b5-1 or 10b-18 plan for a period of 12 months.
